chunks.title: Introduction to the Proverb
chunks.reason: Yahweh introduces the proverb about sour grapes and establishes the principle of individual accountability.

chunks.title: Description of the Righteous Man
chunks.reason: A detailed list of characteristics defining a righteous man who will surely live.

chunks.title: The Violent Son
chunks.reason: A narrative example of a son born to a righteous man who becomes violent and dies for his own sins.

chunks.title: The Righteous Son
chunks.reason: A narrative example of a son who sees his father's sins but remains righteous and lives.

chunks.title: The Wicked Who Turns
chunks.reason: An argument explaining that a wicked man who turns to righteousness will live and a righteous man who turns away will die.

chunks.title: Debate on God's Justice
chunks.reason: A dialogue addressing the people's complaint that God's way is not right.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance
chunks.reason: A final call for the house of Israel to turn from their ways and live.
